title: My Life with Caroline
writer: John Van Druten, Arnold Belgard, Louis Verneuil
actors: Ronald Colman, Anna Lee, Charles Winninger
plot: Caroline Mason, on vacation with her father Mr. Bliss in Idaho, has fallen in love with gaucho Paco Del Valle, and the two plan to get married. The problem is is that she's already married, for five years, to New York publisher An...
